title: WATCH:  Pentagon urges Americans to leave Middle East amid escalating Iran conflict
fullText: Pentagon urges Americans to leave Middle East amid escalating Iran conflictU.S. citizens face flight cancellations and embassy closures as tensions rise. Matt Rivers reports from Beirut amid black smoke and explosions at the airport.March 3, 2026
summary: U.S. citizens face flight cancellations and embassy closures as tensions rise. Matt Rivers reports from Beirut amid black smoke and explosions at the airport.
